description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun with a distinctive tubular metal folding stock and a straight, cylindrical barrel. The receiver and main body are constructed from dark metal, featuring a ribbed foregrip beneath the barrel for improved handling. The pistol grip is angled and made of a similar dark material, likely polymer or metal. The rear of the weapon has a wireframe stock that folds to the side, characteristic of classic military submachine guns such as the MP40. The iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel, with no optical attachments visible. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a folding wire stock, ribbed foregrip, and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, folding wire stock extended, ribbed foregrip, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, front sight, and the open wire stock loop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the stock extended, showing the ejection port and magazine housing.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wire stock's loop and the top of the receiver.
